title: lathyrus hupehensis
intro: Lathyrus hupehensis, also known as the Chinese pea or Hupeh pea, is a type of perennial flowering plant in the legume family, known for its fragrant, purple flowers and edible seeds. The medicinal properties of Lathyrus hupehensis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of consuming Lathyrus hupehensis seeds include lowering cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing a rich source of protein and fiber. Lathyrus hupehensis seeds can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and well-being.
